title: Keplin 5L Watering Can, Durable Plastic Watering Can for Indoor & Outdoor Plants, Easy Pour Garden Jug with Sprinkler Rose, Ideal for Flowers, Houseplants & Gardening (Navy)
features: Compact 5L Capacity for Precision Watering – Designed for small gardens, houseplants, and delicate flowers, this lightweight 5L watering can provides easy, controlled watering without waste.

Plastic Sprinkler Rose for Gentle Water Flow – This watering can outdoor with removable plastic spout ensures a smooth and even water distribution, preventing overwatering and protecting fragile plants and seedlings.

Durable & Lightweight PP+PE Plastic – Made from high-quality, lightweight plastic this small watering can for indoor plants, and 0.4kg watering jug is easy to carry and built to withstand daily use both indoors and outdoors.
Ergonomic Handle & Easy Pour Design – Featuring a comfortable grip and balanced structure, this watering can offers effortless control, ensuring precise, mess-free watering for all your plants.
Perfect for Indoor & Outdoor Use – Ideal for potted plants, hanging baskets, bonsai, succulents, and balcony gardens, this versatile watering can is a must-have for any home gardener.
description: Keplin - 5L Plastic Watering Can with Stainless Steel Sprinkler Rose - Durable Garden Watering Jug for Plants & Flowers - Easy Pour Outdoor & Indoor Watering Can - Navy
